## Checklist
- [ ] `make check` passes (gofmt, arch boundaries, build, golangci-lint, `-race`)
- [ ] New behavior has tests; concurrency changes run under `-race`
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/`) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] Added an ADR under `docs/adr/` if this is a design decision
- [ ] Commit messages contain no AI-authorship attribution (hook-enforced)
